data.name: AppTitle
data.comment: Default product name displayed in the shell header (D19 — proper noun, no translation).

data.name: CommandPaletteTriggerAriaLabel
data.comment: Seeded for Story 3-4; the placeholder button is hidden in 3-1 per D26 / ADR-032.

data.name: SettingsTriggerAriaLabel
data.comment: Seeded for Story 3-3; the placeholder button is hidden in 3-1 per D26 / ADR-032.

data.name: FooterCopyright
data.comment: Default footer copyright line; {0} is the current year.

data.name: DensityForcedByViewportNote
data.value: Your device size is forcing Comfortable density. Your preference will re-apply at larger screen sizes.

data.name: RestoreDefaultsLabel
data.comment: D13 amendment 2026-04-19 (Freya review) — renamed from ResetToDefaultsLabel. "Restore" is honest/plural; "Reset" reads as destructive/irreversible.

data.name: RestoreDefaultsHelperText
data.value: Clears density preference and sets theme to follow system.
data.comment: D13 addition 2026-04-19 (Freya review) — transparency defuses the two-concerns-one-click hesitation.

data.name: PreviewOnlyBadgeText
data.comment: D14 addition 2026-04-19 (Freya review) — removes the "three competing truths" cognitive dissonance at Tablet.

data.name: DensityAnnouncementTemplate
data.comment: D20 addition 2026-04-19 — aria-live announcer template; {0} is the localized density level.

data.name: PaletteTriggerAriaLabel
data.comment: Story 3-4 D14 — header icon button title + aria-label.

data.name: CommandPaletteTitle
data.comment: Story 3-4 D14 — dialog title + content aria-label.

data.name: PaletteSearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search projections, commands, recent… (type ? for shortcuts)
data.comment: Story 3-4 D14 — palette search input placeholder (FluentTextInput type=Search per spike-notes §3). The "? for shortcuts" hint surfaces D23 alias discoverability.

data.name: PaletteResultCountTemplate
data.comment: Story 3-4 D15 — aria-live region template; {0} is the result count.

data.name: PaletteNoResultsText
data.comment: Story 3-4 D15 — empty-state copy AND aria-live announce text on zero results.

data.name: PaletteInCurrentContextSuffix
data.comment: Story 3-4 AC4 — secondary label appended to palette rows in the user's current bounded context. Pass-5 P4 — extracted from markup literal.

data.name: PaletteShortcutDescription
data.comment: Story 3-4 D14 — description column for the Ctrl+K row in the shortcut reference view.

data.name: SettingsShortcutDescription
data.comment: Story 3-4 D14 — description column for the Ctrl+, row in the shortcut reference view.

data.name: HomeShortcutDescription
data.comment: Story 3-4 D14 — description column for the g h chord in the shortcut reference view.

data.name: KeyboardShortcutsCommandLabel
data.comment: Story 3-4 D23 — synthetic default Commands entry that refills the palette with the shortcut reference view.

data.name: KeyboardShortcutsCommandDescription
data.comment: Story 3-4 D23 — entry description for the synthetic "Keyboard Shortcuts" commands row.

data.name: HomeWelcomeTemplate
data.comment: Story 3-5 AC3 / D19 — home greeting placeholder {0} = current user display name. Pre-merge native French review per D19.

data.name: HomeWelcomeAnonymous
data.comment: Story 3-5 D19 (mandatory) — fallback when AuthenticationState identity name is null/empty/whitespace. "Welcome back, ." MUST NOT be producible.

data.name: HomeFirstVisitText
data.value: You're all set up. Items will appear here as teams send work your way.
data.comment: Story 3-5 AC4b / D19 — distinct from HomeAllCaughtUpText to avoid the Day-1 newcomer "is it broken?" failure mode.

data.name: HomeItemsTemplate
data.value: You have {0} items needing attention across {1} areas.
data.comment: Story 3-5 AC3 / D19 — placeholders {0} = TotalActionableItems, {1} = distinct bounded contexts with count > 0.

data.name: HomeAllCaughtUpText
data.value: All caught up. No items need your attention.
data.comment: Story 3-5 AC4a / D19 — returning user with zero urgency. Pre-merge native French review per D19.

data.name: HomeNoMicroservicesText
data.comment: Story 3-5 AC5 / D19 — empty state when GetManifests().Count == 0.

data.name: HomeGettingStartedLinkText
data.comment: Story 3-5 AC5 / D19 — link text under HomeNoMicroservicesText.

data.name: HomeOtherAreasHeading
data.comment: Story 3-5 AC3 / D17 / D19 — collapsed accordion heading for zero-urgency contexts.

data.name: HomeSortedByUrgencyAriaDescription
data.comment: Story 3-5 AC7 / D19 — aria-description on the cards-list container.

data.name: NewCapabilityBadgeText
data.comment: Story 3-5 AC8 / D12 / D19 — subtle FluentBadge label next to nav entries / card headers for unseen capabilities with data.

data.name: HomeActionQueueSubtitleTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-1 D18 / AC6 — contextual subtitle for ActionQueue-annotated projections. {0}=count (badge service), {1}=humanized entity plural. Native-French pre-pass required per D18 / T8.4.

data.name: HomeStatusOverviewSubtitleTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-1 D18 / AC6 — contextual subtitle for StatusOverview-annotated projections. {0}=total row count, {1}=humanized entity plural.

data.name: HomeDefaultSubtitleTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-1 D18 / AC6 — contextual subtitle for projections without a role attribute. Pre-pass required per D18.

data.name: HomeDetailSubtitleTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-1 D18 / AC6 — contextual subtitle for DetailRecord-annotated projections. {0}=humanized entity singular (Sally copy nudge: "overview" reads as an intimate heading).

data.name: HomeTimelineSubtitleTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-1 D18 / AC6 — contextual subtitle for Timeline-annotated projections. {0}=total event count.

data.name: HomeEmptyPlaceholderText
data.comment: Story 4-1 D18 / AC8 — minimal empty-state message rendered by FcProjectionEmptyPlaceholder. {0}=humanized entity plural. Story 4.6 replaces the component body without changing this key. Pre-pass required per D18.

data.name: HomeEmptyPlaceholderAriaLabel
data.comment: Story 4-1 D18 / AC8 — aria-label on the empty placeholder container for AT. {0}=humanized entity plural.

data.name: EmptyStateMessageTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-6 — default empty-state primary copy. {0}=humanized entity plural.

data.name: EmptyStateActionQueueMessageTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-6 — ActionQueue empty-state primary copy. {0}=humanized entity plural.

data.name: EmptyStateAriaLabelTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-6 — aria-label on the empty-state container. {0}=humanized entity plural.

data.name: EmptyStateCtaTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-6 D8 — empty-state CTA visible label. {0}=command display name. No colon (D8).

data.name: FieldPlaceholderMessageTemplate
data.value: This field requires a custom renderer.
data.comment: Story 4-6 D8 — unsupported field placeholder message. No interpolation per D8 spec template.

data.name: FieldPlaceholderAriaLabelTemplate
data.value: {0} with unsupported type {1} requires a custom renderer
data.comment: Story 4-6 — unsupported field placeholder aria-label. {0}=field name, {1}=type name.

data.name: FieldPlaceholderDocsLinkText
data.value: Learn how to customize this field
data.comment: Story 4-6 — unsupported field placeholder docs link text.

data.name: FieldPlaceholderTypeAnnotationTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-6 D8 — unsupported field placeholder type annotation. {0}=type name. No colon (D8).

data.name: UnsupportedColumnHeaderSuffix
data.comment: Story 4-6 — appended to unsupported column headers so placeholders are visually distinct. (Note P-29: FieldDescriptionTooltipAriaSuffix and ColumnHeaderWithDescriptionAriaTemplate were removed per DN4-a — D9 anatomy reduced to FluentDataGrid HeaderTooltip; the icon+aria-describedby anatomy is deferred to Story 4-7.)

data.name: FcProjectionLoadingSkeletonAriaLabel
data.comment: Story 4-1 D18 / AC8 — aria-label on the loading skeleton container (role=status, aria-busy=true). {0}=humanized entity plural.

data.name: StatusBadgeAriaLabelTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-2 D4 / D12 / AC5 — aria-label template for FcStatusBadge when a ColumnHeader is supplied. {0}=column header, {1}=badge label. French satellite inserts U+00A0 NBSP before the colon.

data.name: StatusBadgeUnknownStateFallback
data.comment: Story 4-2 D4 — fail-soft label when a runtime enum value is outside the declared member set (should never happen for [ProjectionBadge]-annotated enums).

data.name: ColumnFilterPlaceholderTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-3 D19 / AC1 — placeholder text inside the per-column FluentSearch filter. {0}=humanized column header.

data.name: ColumnFilterAriaLabelTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-3 D19 / AC1 — aria-label announced for each column filter input. {0}=humanized column header.

data.name: StatusFilterChipsAriaLabel
data.comment: Story 4-3 D19 / AC2 — group aria-label for the chips strip above the grid.

data.name: StatusFilterChipAriaLabelTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-3 D19 / AC2 — per-chip aria-label. {0}=slot label, {1}=active/inactive status.

data.name: StatusFilterChipActiveLabel
data.comment: Story 4-3 Review pass 2 — localized "active" substitution for StatusFilterChipAriaLabelTemplate {1}.

data.name: StatusFilterChipInactiveLabel
data.comment: Story 4-3 Review pass 2 — localized "inactive" substitution for StatusFilterChipAriaLabelTemplate {1}.

data.name: GlobalSearchPlaceholder
data.comment: Story 4-3 D19 / AC4 — placeholder for the optional FcProjectionGlobalSearch input.

data.name: GlobalSearchAriaLabel
data.comment: Story 4-3 D19 / AC4 — aria-label for the optional FcProjectionGlobalSearch input.

data.name: FilterSummaryShowingTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-3 D19 / AC3 — leading prefix for FcFilterSummary. {0}=filtered count, {1}=total count, {2}=entity plural.

data.name: FilterSummaryStatusClauseTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-3 D19 / AC3 — status chip clause for FcFilterSummary. {0}=joined slot labels. French satellite uses NBSP before the colon.

data.name: FilterSummaryColumnContainsTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-3 D19 / AC3 — per-column filter clause for FcFilterSummary. {0}=humanized column header, {1}=filter value.

data.name: FilterSummarySearchClauseTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-3 D19 / AC3 — global search clause for FcFilterSummary. {0}=search query. French satellite uses NBSP + guillemets.

data.name: FilterSummarySortClauseTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-3 Review pass 2 — sort clause for FcFilterSummary. {0}=humanized column header, {1}=localized direction label.

data.name: SortDirectionAscending
data.comment: Story 4-3 Review pass 2 — direction label substituted into FilterSummarySortClauseTemplate {1}.

data.name: SortDirectionDescending
data.comment: Story 4-3 Review pass 2 — direction label substituted into FilterSummarySortClauseTemplate {1}.

data.name: FilterSummaryOrConjunction
data.comment: Story 4-3 Review pass 2 — conjunction joining multiple status chip labels in FcFilterSummary. Surrounding spaces are intentional.

data.name: FilterResetButtonLabel
data.comment: Story 4-3 D19 / AC3 — visible label for the FcFilterResetButton.

data.name: FilterResetButtonAriaLabelTemplate
data.value: Reset all filters. {0} filters currently active.
data.comment: Story 4-3 D19 / AC3 — aria-label for FcFilterResetButton. {0}=active filter count.

data.name: EmptyFilteredStateTemplate
data.value: No {0} match the current filters. Reset filters to see all {1} {0}.
data.comment: Story 4-3 D19 / AC6 — FcFilterEmptyState body copy. {0}=entity plural, {1}=total count.

data.name: SlashFocusFilterShortcutDescription
data.value: Focus the first column filter in the current DataGrid
data.comment: Story 4-3 Review pass 2 — description column for the `/` shortcut row in the shortcut reference view (replaces the copy-pasted PaletteShortcutDescription).

data.name: PrioritizerMoreColumnsButtonLabelTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-4 D19 — legacy text-button label retained for adopters who invoke FcColumnPrioritizer manually outside the gear-icon generator emission.

data.name: PrioritizerMoreColumnsAriaLabelTemplate
data.value: Hidden columns: {0}. Activate to show more.
data.comment: Story 4-4 D19 revised — plural-neutral colon framing for the gear-icon aria-label. {0}=hidden count.

data.name: PrioritizerColumnsAllVisibleAriaLabel
data.value: All columns visible. Open column visibility settings.
data.comment: Story 4-4 D19 N=0 rider — substituted when every column is currently visible so the aria-label does not announce "Hidden columns: 0".

data.name: PrioritizerColumnsPanelTitle
data.comment: Story 4-4 D19 — title of the prioritizer popover; referenced by aria-labelledby.

data.name: PrioritizerColumnCheckboxAriaLabelTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-4 D19 — aria-label template for each column checkbox inside the prioritizer popover. {0}=column header.

data.name: PrioritizerResetToDefaults
data.comment: Story 4-4 D19 Sally-review addition — footer hyperlink inside the prioritizer popover that dispatches ResetColumnVisibilityAction.

data.name: SlowQueryNoticeMessage
data.value: Loading is slow. Add filters to narrow results.
data.comment: Story 4-4 D19 / AC3 — body of FcSlowQueryNotice.

data.name: MaxItemsCapNoticeTemplate
data.value: Showing first {0} items. Use filters to find specific records.
data.comment: Story 4-4 D19 / AC4 — body of FcMaxItemsCapNotice. {0}=MaxUnfilteredItems cap.

data.name: VirtualizedSkeletonRowAriaLabel
data.comment: Story 4-4 D19 — aria-label applied to Virtualize skeleton rows. Uses U+2026 HORIZONTAL ELLIPSIS for consistency with Fluent UI.

data.name: UnfilteredRowCountTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-4 D9 / D19 — row-count label when no filters are active. {0}=count, {1}=entity plural.

data.name: ExpandRowButtonAriaLabelTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-5 D15 / AC1 — aria-label on the row-action chevron when collapsed. {0}=row identifier.

data.name: CollapseRowButtonAriaLabelTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-5 D15 / AC1 — aria-label on the row-action chevron when expanded. {0}=row identifier.

data.name: ExpandInRowDetailPanelAriaLabelTemplate
data.comment: Story 4-5 D15 / D19 / AC3 — aria-label on the FcExpandInRowDetail region landmark. {0}=row identifier.

data.name: FieldGroupCatchAllTitle
data.comment: Story 4-5 D9 / D15 / AC5 — heading of the catch-all FluentAccordionItem for ungrouped secondary fields. Reserved label — colliding [ProjectionFieldGroup] names trigger HFC1030.

data.name: ExpandInRowDetailSuppressedByFilterAnnouncement
data.value: Your expanded item is hidden by the current filter
data.comment: Story 4-5 D19 / AC8 — visually-hidden live-region announcement when a column-filter change suppresses the currently-expanded row.

data.name: ExpandedRowHiddenByFilterBanner
data.value: {0} expanded item hidden by current filter
data.comment: Story 4-5 D15 / AC8 — banner copy above FluentDataGrid when expanded row is suppressed by filter. {0}=count (always "1" in v1; ICU pluralization bundles with multi-expand v2 commit).

data.name: ExpandedRowHiddenByFilterBannerClearLink
data.comment: Story 4-5 D15 / AC8 — banner action link dispatching FiltersResetAction (Story 4-3).

data.name: ReconnectStatusText
data.comment: Story 5-4 AC6 — Shell header text while SignalR automatic reconnect is active.

data.name: ReconciliationStatusText
data.comment: Story 5-4 AC6 — Shell header text while visible lanes are being reconciled.

data.name: ReconnectedDataRefreshedText
data.comment: Story 5-4 AC4 — info message after reconnect reconciliation finds changed visible data.

data.name: SectionUpdatingText
data.comment: Story 5-4 AC7 — lane-scoped schema mismatch fallback copy.

data.name: OptimisticBadgeConfirmingLabel
data.comment: Story 5-5 — optimistic badge state while a command is awaiting terminal outcome.

data.name: OptimisticBadgeConfirmedLabel
data.comment: Story 5-5 — optimistic badge state after the server confirms.

data.name: OptimisticBadgeRejectedLabel
data.comment: Story 5-5 — optimistic badge state after the server rejects.

data.name: OptimisticBadgeAlreadyAppliedLabel
data.comment: Story 5-5 — optimistic badge state for an idempotent-confirmed terminal.

data.name: OptimisticBadgeNeedsReviewLabel
data.comment: Story 5-5 — optimistic badge state for an unresolved or evicted command.

data.name: OptimisticBadgeAriaLabelTemplate
data.comment: Story 5-5 — accessible label combining {0}=column header, {1}=state, {2}=value text.

data.name: NewItemIndicatorText
data.value: New item. It may not match current filters yet.
data.comment: Story 5-5 AC5 — visible copy for the lane-scoped new-item indicator.

data.name: NewItemIndicatorAriaLabel
data.value: New item added outside current filters
data.comment: Story 5-5 P12 — distinct accessible label for the role=status indicator.

data.name: PendingCommandSummaryCountsTemplate
data.comment: Story 5-5 AC8 — bounded count summary header. Numeric placeholders only.

data.name: PendingCommandSummaryConfirmedTemplate
data.comment: Story 5-5 — confirmed entry; {0} = command type display name.

data.name: PendingCommandSummaryAlreadyAppliedTemplate
data.comment: Story 5-5 — idempotent-confirmed entry; {0} = command type display name.

data.name: PendingCommandSummaryNeedsReviewTemplate
data.value: {0}: unresolved. Review the current data before retrying.
data.comment: Story 5-5 — needs-review entry; {0} = command type display name.

data.name: PendingCommandSummaryRejectedTitleTemplate
data.comment: Story 5-5 — fallback Danger MessageBar title when no server-supplied title is available; {0} = command type display name.

data.name: PendingCommandSummaryRejectedBodyTemplate
data.comment: Story 5-5 DN6 — three-clause rejection format: {0}=title, {1}=detail, {2}=data impact.

data.name: PendingCommandSummaryDataImpactDefault
data.comment: Story 5-5 DN6 — default localizable third clause when the server omits a data-impact statement.

data.name: PendingCommandSummaryOverflowTemplate
data.comment: Story 5-5 — overflow line when bounded MaxDetails truncates the visible list.
